era_context: Early Bronze Age III; same as -3174 and -3173. This period marks the transition from prehistory to proto-history in the Old World. Writing is emerging but not yet used for historical narrative. Monumental architecture (temples, palaces) is being constructed in Egypt and Mesopotamia.
disconfirming_evidence: No events documented. No disconfirming evidence applies.
historiographic_note: Same as -3174 and -3173. The historical record is non-existent for this year.
